title: Playable product UX acceptance reset and first-five-minute spec
summary: Turn the Owner/art-thread critique into a concrete first-five-minute product spec and acceptance reset centered on visible NPC action, clear player goals, and a lamp/build playable slice.
acceptance: First-five-minute product spec records the Owner and art-thread critique as a hard product blocker, not polish feedback
Spec defines a 2-3 minute dusk lamp/simple-build playable slice with start state, objective, player commands, success path and structured failure paths
Spec makes player-perceptible NPC action a hard acceptance gate: idle, moving, working, blocked, completed and failed states must be visible and understandable
Spec defines first-screen information priority: map and active pawns first, one objective, one obvious action path, concise resources/alerts and no default diagnostics/status-board language
No product implementation, platform verdict change or public release/EA/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/paid-services/public-save action is executed
forbiddenPaths: signing, telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback, paid services or public save compatibility
